SCHEDULE 13D

Under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934

Item 1. Security and Issuer

Issuer: ACME Corporation

CUSIP: 000360206

Item 2. Identity and Background

Reporting Person: Atlas Capital Management LP

CIK: 0001234567

Item 3. Source and Amount of Funds

Total funds used: $485,000,000

Item 4. Purpose of Transaction

Atlas Capital acquired shares for investment purposes and may engage in discussions with the Board of Directors.

Item 5. Interest in Securities

Shares beneficially owned: 12,500,000

Percent of class: 7.4%

Event date: February 28, 2026
